nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=85 beats='on a sunny Monday morning the class files into the summer camp field and Coach Reyes lifts the row cover with a gasp; the leaves in the batting cages are full of tiny nibbled cleat straps; Kofi, who keeps his squad clipboard in her pocket, raises her hand to take the case; her friends cheer her on; curious and excited, never scared'>>

choices.label: Take a closer look at the nibbled granola bars.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=80 beats='Kofi kneels by the batting cages and studies tiny nibbled cleat straps like a real detective; the nibbles are small and neat, not torn or stomped, so the visitor must be little and gentle; she writes a clue about tiny teeth in his squad clipboard; the best place to start looking is the flagpole circle where every garden path begins'>>

choices.label: Start at the flagpole circle where all the paths meet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='Kofi stands on the flagpole circle by the garden gate; paths spread out like wheel spokes to the batting cages, the recycling bins, the snack shed, the tall cornhole row, and the sprinkler edge, with the old dugout waiting at the very back of the summer camp field; she flips through his squad clipboard, taps her pencil, and picks where to look next; keep this scene general so it reads naturally on a first visit or on any return trip between corners'>>

choices.label: Search the batting cages for footprints.
Poke around the recycling bins.
Check inside the snack shed.
Walk down the tall cornhole row.
Look for clues along the sprinkler edge.
Head for the old dugout at the back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='in the soft dark soil between the rows in the batting cages Kofi spots small scuffling pawprints, little round front paws and long back feet landing in hoppy pairs; a hopping visitor, she whispers, and grips her pencil; she decides whether to sketch the prints carefully in his squad clipboard or crawl along and follow them right away'>>

choices.label: Sketch the footprints in his squad clipboard.
Follow the footprints right away.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='Kofi sketches the pawprints slowly and carefully, and the sketch makes the answer clearer, big back feet mean a hopper; the trail of prints points straight toward the old dugout at the back of the summer camp field; she can go back to the flagpole circle to check another corner or follow the prints toward the old dugout now'>>

choices.label: Go back to the flagpole circle.
Follow the prints toward the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='Kofi hustles along and blurs a few, oops; she slows down, detective style, and the trail still shows where it is going, straight toward the old dugout; a small lesson learned, move slowly; she can head back to the flagpole circle or trail the prints onward'>>

choices.label: Head back to the flagpole circle.
Trail the prints toward the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the recycling bins smells warm and earthy, and behind the bins Kofi finds a gap behind the bins dug right under the garden fence; it is round and smooth and just the size of a loaf of bread; she chooses whether to peek inside it, to check where it comes out past the fence, or to dig through the recycling bins for buried clues'>>

choices.label: Lie down and peek into a gap behind the bins.
Check where a gap behind the bins comes out past the fence.
Dig through the recycling bins for buried clues.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='Kofi lies on her tummy and peeks into a gap behind the bins; it is tidy and round, with a tuft of orange fur caught on a root, a brand new clue for his squad clipboard; it aims toward the old dugout; she can return to the flagpole circle or head toward the old dugout now'>>

choices.label: Return to the flagpole circle.
Head toward the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='on the far side of the fence a gap behind the bins pops out under a patch of clover, and every stem nearby is nibbled with the same tiny nibbled cleat straps; the visitor loves greens; the nibbled trail wanders toward the old dugout; Kofi can go back to the flagpole circle or follow the trail onward'>>

choices.label: Go back to the flagpole circle.
Follow the nibbled trail to the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the door of the snack shed is open a crack, and inside, between flowerpots and watering cans, sits a dented metal cooler that does not belong on the shelf; a box of tipped-over granola bars lies beside it; very suspicious; Kofi decides whether to open a dented metal cooler carefully or to look around the snack shed for more signs first'>>

choices.label: Open a dented metal cooler carefully.
Look around the snack shed for more signs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='inside a dented metal cooler Kofi finds crisp granola bars leaves packed like a tiny picnic and a sticker tag that names Diego; so a classmate has been sneaking granola bars snacks into the summer camp field, but who are the snacks for; she can go ask Diego about a dented metal cooler or carry this clue back to the flagpole circle'>>

choices.label: Go ask Diego about a dented metal cooler.
Take the clue back to the flagpole circle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='behind the watering cans a trail of crumbs leads from a dented metal cooler across the floor of the snack shed to a small gap under the wall; Kofi follows the crumbs with her eyes; the gap faces the old dugout at the back of the summer camp field; she can head back to the flagpole circle or go toward the old dugout now'>>

choices.label: Head back to the flagpole circle.
Follow the crumb trail toward the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='Kofi finds Diego watering the beans, and he turns pink and spills the secret; he saw something small and fluffy near the old dugout last week and left granola bars so it would not go hungry; he was being kind, not naughty; he points her toward the old dugout and stays behind to finish his watering job'>>

choices.label: Go back to the flagpole circle.
Head for the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='the tall cornhole row towers like a green hallway, and some of the low leaves wear the same tiny nibbled cleat straps; under the stems the mulch is pressed down into a narrow gap behind the boards, only knee high; Kofi decides whether to crawl along a narrow gap behind the boards or to climb a stack of folding chairs and look over the whole row from above'>>

choices.label: Crawl along a narrow gap behind the boards.
Climb the bench to look over the tall cornhole row.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='Kofi crawls under the stems along a narrow gap behind the boards and finds a warm flattened nook with a tuft of orange fur, like a tiny travelers inn; the little path keeps going toward the old dugout; she can back out and return to the flagpole circle or keep following the path'>>

choices.label: Back out to the flagpole circle.
Keep following the path to the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='from the top of a stack of folding chairs the summer camp field looks like a map, and Kofi can see faint little trails through the beds and the mulch, all bending toward the old dugout like arrows; she writes a note that every trail points one way in his squad clipboard; she can hop down to the flagpole circle or head straight for the old dugout'>>

choices.label: Hop down and go to the flagpole circle.
Head straight for the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the damp sprinkler edge is soft and muddy, perfect for prints, and there they are, small scuffling pawprints stopping right at the waterline for a drink; a frog plops into the water and makes Kofi jump, then laugh; she chooses to follow the prints along the mud, to check the rustling reeds, or to lean way out over the water for a closer look'>>

choices.label: Follow the little prints along the mud.
Check the rustling reeds.
Lean way out over the water for a closer look.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='the mud keeps small scuffling pawprints crisp and clear like stamps; Kofi reads the story in them, a flattened patch of grass, a drink at the pond, then hop hop hop away toward the old dugout; she can return to the flagpole circle or follow the hops toward the old dugout'>>

choices.label: Return to the flagpole circle.
Follow the hops toward the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the rustle in the reeds turns out to be a lazy garden lizard under a leaf, a friendly false alarm; but from down low Kofi spots small scuffling pawprints leaving the mud and heading toward the old dugout; she says goodbye to a lazy garden lizard; she can go back to the flagpole circle or follow the prints'>>

choices.label: Go back to the flagpole circle.
Follow the prints to the old dugout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=88 beats='the old dugout is a hushed leafy nook behind the equipment rack where the summer camp field goes quiet; under the willow roots Kofi sees a cozy nest of towels, a tuft of orange fur on a twig, and small scuffling pawprints in the dust right at her feet; the clues line up here all by themselves, whichever corners she has already checked; she decides whether to tiptoe close and wait like a statue, to sit in the clover holding out a granola bars leaf, or to dash over for a quick peek'>>

choices.label: Tiptoe close and wait as still as a statue.
Sit in the clover and hold out a granola bars leaf.
Dash over for a quick peek.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='Kofi tiptoes behind the equipment rack and waits still as a dugout post, counting her own quiet breaths; after a long hush a twitchy whiskery nose pokes out of a cozy nest of towels, then soft ears, then careful round eyes; something small hops one brave hop into the light'>>

choices.label: Keep watching quietly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='Kofi sits down in the clover and holds out a granola bar, low and still, the way you offer a snack to somebody shy; the granola bars leaf trembles a tiny bit in the breeze; soon a whiskery nose sniffs from the doorway of a cozy nest of towels, and a small visitor hops one brave hop toward her'>>

choices.label: Stay very still and watch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='out comes a scruffy mother cat, and tumbling after her come three tumbling kittens who bounce into the clover and nibble; Kofi checks his squad clipboard without making a sound, small scuffling pawprints, a cozy nest of towels, a tuft of orange fur, tiny nibbled cleat straps, every single clue fits; the granola bars mystery has a soft, whiskery answer'>>

choices.label: Put all the clues together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='mystery solved, the granola bars visitors are a hungry kitten family living under the willow, a scruffy mother cat and three tumbling kittens with wiggly noses; nobody is in trouble, they were only hungry; now Kofi, junior garden detective, gets to choose a kind ending; she can plant a kitten patch of greens just for the kittens, plan a low fence with a gate to share the summer camp field politely, or run and tell Coach Reyes and the class the news'>>

choices.label: Plant a patch just for the kittens.
Plan a low fence with a gate around the granola bars.
Go tell Coach Reyes and the class.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the class loves the plan, and everyone helps plant a kitten patch by the old dugout, bowls of kibble and warm blankets just for the kitten family; Kofi paints a little wooden sign for it; soon the patch is ready for its very first furry customers'>>

choices.label: Open the kitten buffet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='with Coach Reyes helping, the class builds a low fence with a small gate around the batting cages for gardeners; the old dugout stays wild and cozy for the kitten family; Kofi taps the last post into place, and the summer camp field feels fair for everyone, people veggies here, kitten snacks there'>>

choices.label: Finish the little fence together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Kofi opens his squad clipboard on Coach Reyes helper table and walks the team through the case, tiny nibbled cleat straps, small scuffling pawprints, a tuft of orange fur, a cozy nest of towels under the willow; everyone gasps at the answer; then the whole class lines up to tiptoe out and meet the kitten family'>>

choices.label: Lead everyone to the old dugout on tiptoe.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the class peeks around the equipment rack in a quiet wiggly line and spots a scruffy mother cat and her three tumbling kittens nibbling clover; happy whispers everywhere; now the class decides together how to share the summer camp field, hang a friendly kitten crossing sign by the old dugout, or make kitten watching an official class job'>>

choices.label: Hang a friendly kitten crossing sign.
Make kitten watching a class job.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=70 beats='Kofi digs and sifts through the recycling bins and finds wiggly worms, a giggle, and not one single clue; the tidy-up bell rings before she can search anywhere else; she dusts off her hands, smiling, and writes a note to follow a gap behind the bins tomorrow in his squad clipboard; a gentle try-again, nobody sad or hurt'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=70 beats='Kofi leans out one lean too far and her boot slips into the damp sprinkler edge with a squelchy splash; she is perfectly fine, just soggy to the ankle, but squishy socks mean a trip inside to change; the mystery will wait until tomorrow, she grins, and the frog seems to wave goodbye; gentle, never scary'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=72 beats='Kofi dashes toward a cozy nest of towels and THUMP, a big back foot drums the ground and a flash of white tail zips underground before she can blink; the old dugout goes still; she whispers sorry, writes a note to move slowly in his squad clipboard, and plans to come back quietly tomorrow; a friendly miss, ready to try again'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='the kitten patch works like a charm; the kitten family nibbles clover on their own side of the summer camp field and the class granola bars grows back big and crunchy; every morning the class checks the patch, and every morning there are happy new footprints; Kofi adds the last note to the case in his squad clipboard, solved, with kindness'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='the little fence keeps the granola bars safe without scaring anyone, and the kitten family stays snug in the wild the old dugout; at harvest time the class shares a leaf or two over the gate anyway; Kofi clips his squad clipboard shut with a happy snap, case closed, garden shared, everybody fed'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='the kitten crossing sign goes up by the old dugout and the whole school learns to walk softly past it; the summer camp field becomes famous for its smallest neighbors, and visitors tiptoe just to peek; Kofi signs the bottom corner of the sign, junior garden detective, and a scruffy mother cat watches as if she approves'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='kitten watching becomes a real class job with a clipboard and everything, and everyone gets a turn counting kittens at quiet time; three tumbling kittens grow bigger and bolder all spring long; Kofi starts a brand new page in his squad clipboard titled more garden mysteries please, because the best detective work ends kindly'>>
